groups.name: platform.rest.client.clients
groups.description: Named REST client configurations. Each key is the logical client name.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the external service (e.g. https://payment.example.com).

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].default-content-type
properties.description: Default Content-Type header applied to every request made by this client.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].default-accept
properties.description: Default Accept header applied to every request made by this client.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].default-query-params
properties.description: Default query parameters appended to every request made by this client.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for establishing a TCP connection to the remote host.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout for waiting for a response after the connection is established.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].endpoints
properties.description: Named endpoint definitions. Each key becomes the logical endpoint name.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].endpoints[*].method
properties.description: HTTP method for this endpoint (e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE).

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].endpoints[*].path
properties.description: URL path relative to the client's base-url. May contain URI template variables such as /api/v1/payments/{id}.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].endpoints[*].default-query-params
properties.description: Default query parameters for this specific endpoint, merged on top of client-level default-query-params.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].endpoints[*].content-type
properties.description: Content-Type header override for this endpoint. Takes precedence over the client-level default-content-type.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].endpoints[*].accept
properties.description: Accept header override for this endpoint. Takes precedence over the client-level default-accept.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Total number of attempts (including the first). Defaults to 3 when omitted.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].retry.wait-duration
properties.description: Base wait duration between retry attempts. Defaults to 500ms when omitted.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].retry.multiplier
properties.description: Multiplier for exponential back-off. Values greater than 1.0 enable exponential back-off. Defaults to 1.0 (fixed back-off).

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].retry.max-wait-duration
properties.description: Maximum wait duration cap when exponential back-off is active. Ignored when multiplier is 1.0 or absent.

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].retry.retry-on-response-statuses
properties.description: HTTP response status codes that should trigger a retry (e.g. 429, 503, 504).

properties.name: platform.rest.client.clients[*].ssl.bundle
properties.description: Name of the SSL bundle (as configured under spring.ssl.bundle.*) to apply to this client's connections.
